summary: Frontend-only testing of Next.js 15 App Router cutover for The Local Jewel. SSR raw-HTML inspection PASS on all 8 SEO-critical pages (/, /collections, /projects[*], /blog, /contact, /cuts, /privacy, /terms). PDP JSON-LD includes Organization+WebSite+Product+BreadcrumbList. Contact LocalBusiness/JewelryStore schema present. 308 redirect /products/:slug -> /projects/:slug works. QuickQuoteModal lead flow works end-to-end (POSTs lead, success state, stores tlj_token). PDP buy-box (v2-title/v2-fast-badge/v2-from-price/add-to-bag) works. Header + Footer testids present on all Next.js pages. Customer OTP login (Next.js /login) reaches /dashboard. 3 CRITICAL issues found: (1) /projects returns HTTP 500 - function 'labelFor' passed from Server Component to Client Component; (2) Legacy CRA fails to compile in browser - babel-metadata-plugin crashes on frontend-legacy/src/components/wizard/QuickQuoteModal.js, breaking /admin, /dashboard, /cart, /checkout/success, /pitch (all served via Next.js rewrites); (3) QuickQuoteModal success state uses data-testid 'quick-quote-success' NOT 'qq-success' as the brief specified - minor naming mismatch.

ui_bugs.issue: GET /projects returns HTTP 500. Cause: server component passes the JS function `labelFor` as a prop to the Client Component <ProjectsFilter>. Next.js 15 App Router does not serialize functions across the server/client boundary. Logs: 'Functions cannot be passed directly to Client Components ... labelFor={function labelFor} ... digest: 2463296782'. Effect: filter chips and project cards never render; entire /projects index is broken.

Legacy CRA fails to compile in browser. Babel build error: 'TypeError: /app/frontend-legacy/src/components/wizard/QuickQuoteModal.js: Cannot read properties of null (reading "traverse")' originating in /app/frontend-legacy/plugins/visual-edits/babel-metadata-plugin.js:1879:32 (PluginPass.JSXElement). The CRA dev server returns 200 for /dashboard and /admin/login internally, but the bundle fails to compile and the browser shows the React error overlay 'Uncaught runtime errors:'. This means after a Next.js /login OTP redirect to /dashboard, users see a runtime-error overlay instead of the account portal. /admin/login form does not render (0 inputs found). Cart drawer route /cart is also broken via the rewrite path.

Success state uses data-testid='quick-quote-success' but the review request and likely automation/QA scripts expect 'qq-success'. The flow itself works (POST /api/leads/quick succeeds, modal shows 'Got it. Talk soon!' with Go-to-my-account CTA, tlj_token is stored in localStorage). Pure testid naming inconsistency vs the other qq-* testids (qq-name, qq-email, qq-phone, qq-notes, qq-submit, qq-error).

integration_issues.flow: Customer login -> /dashboard (Next.js -> legacy CRA via rewrite)
integration_issues.issue: Next.js OTP login works (otp-display-code shows 6-digit code, typing it auto-submits and navigates to /dashboard). However /dashboard is served by the broken legacy CRA bundle, so the dashboard tabs (account-overview, tab-overview, tab-quotes, tab-orders, tab-messages, tab-profile) never render - the page shows the React error overlay instead. Blocks the full login -> dashboard flow.

integration_issues.flow: Admin login -> /admin/login (Next.js -> legacy CRA via rewrite)
integration_issues.issue: /admin/login renders but no email/password inputs appear in DOM (legacy CRA bundle crashed during compile). Cannot login with ansh@thelocaljewel.com / Rakesh@2709. Blocks ALL admin functionality (/admin analytics, /admin/leads, /admin/settings).

integration_issues.flow: Cart drawer (legacy CRA via Next.js rewrite)
integration_issues.issue: Header cart icon (data-testid='header-cart-button') is present and the badge count updates after add-to-bag on Next.js PDP, but the actual /cart route is served by the broken legacy CRA, so the drawer/cart page cannot open.

ssr_verification.homepage_title: The Local Jewel - Custom Diamond Jewelry, Hand-Crafted in Winter Park, FL (in raw HTML)
ssr_verification.blog_post_json_ld: Article + BreadcrumbList present on /blog/how-to-pick-a-lab-grown-diamond (the slug 'local-jewel-v2' mentioned in the review brief does NOT exist - HTTP 404; only how-to-pick-a-lab-grown-diamond is seeded).
ssr_verification.contact_json_ld: JewelryStore + LocalBusiness-equivalent fields (PostalAddress, GeoCoordinates, OpeningHoursSpecification, ContactPoint) all present in raw HTML.
ssr_verification.pdp_buy_box: v2-title='5 Carat Oval Solitaire Engagement Ring', v2-fast-badge='Fast - Ships in 2-5 business days', v2-from-price='$1,800', v2-add-to-bag works, header cart badge increments to 1.

critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/app/projects/page.js: do NOT pass `labelFor` function to <ProjectsFilter />. Either (a) move labelFor INTO ProjectsFilter.js (client component), (b) pre-compute label strings server-side and pass a Record<string,string>, or (c) mark ProjectsFilter with 'use server' and call labelFor server-side. This is a hard P0 - the entire /projects index returns HTTP 500.

frontend-legacy/plugins/visual-edits/babel-metadata-plugin.js crashes on frontend-legacy/src/components/wizard/QuickQuoteModal.js at ImportDeclaration -> lookupCrossFilePropSource -> tracePropToSource. Either remove the plugin from the legacy CRA babel config OR delete the unused QuickQuoteModal.js file in frontend-legacy/ (the Next.js app already has its own components/QuickQuoteModal.js). Without this fix /admin, /dashboard, /cart, /checkout/success, /pitch are all unusable.

Naming consistency: /app/frontend/components/QuickQuoteModal.js uses data-testid='quick-quote-success' but every other field uses the qq-* prefix. Rename to 'qq-success' for consistency with the rest of the modal and with the review brief.

/app/frontend/app/projects/page.js exports `labelFor` as module-scope arrow fn but uses it both on the server (to build tags array) and passes it client-side. Build labelled tags array {tag,label} on the server and pass only that serializable array.
Browserslist data 6 months old in legacy CRA (warning only, but worth a refresh).
action_items: P0: Fix /projects HTTP 500 by removing the labelFor function prop crossing the server->client boundary in /app/frontend/app/projects/page.js.

P0: Fix legacy CRA Babel compile crash in frontend-legacy/plugins/visual-edits/babel-metadata-plugin.js OR delete frontend-legacy/src/components/wizard/QuickQuoteModal.js (it triggers the crash and isn't used by anything in the Next.js app). Without this fix ALL admin and dashboard routes are broken.
P3: Rename data-testid 'quick-quote-success' -> 'qq-success' in /app/frontend/components/QuickQuoteModal.js for consistency.
P3: Confirm the brief's intended blog slug. /blog/local-jewel-v2 returns 404. The only seeded post is /blog/how-to-pick-a-lab-grown-diamond.

P3: /collections index renders only 1 collection-card via [data-testid^='collection-card-'] although raw HTML contains anchors to engagement-rings AND wedding-bands - investigate (wedding-bands card may be missing the data-testid attribute or be filtered out).

success_rate.frontend: ~70% - SSR/SEO/JSON-LD/QuickQuote/PDP/Contact/Login pass; /projects 500, all legacy-CRA routes (admin, dashboard, cart) broken

test_credentials: Admin ansh@thelocaljewel.com / Rakesh@2709 - admin form did NOT render due to legacy CRA build failure; OTP customer login dynamic (otp-display-code).
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test lead via QuickQuoteModal (sdet_nextjs_test@example.com) and 1 customer test user via OTP login (sdettest_kb_<ts>@example.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: After P0 fixes land: (1) re-curl https://next-frontend-live.preview.emergentagent.com/projects expecting 200 + project cards in raw HTML, (2) re-login via /login OTP and assert /dashboard renders [data-testid='account-overview'] + the 4 tab buttons, (3) re-test /admin/login with ansh@thelocaljewel.com / Rakesh@2709 expecting /admin analytics. The /projects/5-carat-oval-solitaire-engagement-ring PDP, all SSR SEO pages, and the QuickQuoteModal lead flow are already verified PASS this round so they can be smoke-tested only. Valid blog slug in this env is 'how-to-pick-a-lab-grown-diamond', NOT 'local-jewel-v2'.
rca of the issue: 1) /projects 500: /app/frontend/app/projects/page.js line 57 renders <ProjectsFilter projects={projects} tags={tags} labelFor={labelFor} />. ProjectsFilter has 'use client'. Next.js 15 RSC payload serialization rejects function props (only 'use server'-annotated functions can cross). Fix by either pre-computing tag labels into the tags array server-side (recommended) or moving the labelFor helper into ProjectsFilter.js. 2) Legacy CRA failure: /app/frontend-legacy/plugins/visual-edits/babel-metadata-plugin.js attempts AST traversal on a JSX file that imports a null-ish module path, throwing 'Cannot read properties of null (reading traverse)' specifically on frontend-legacy/src/components/wizard/QuickQuoteModal.js. The CRA dev server returns 200 but the resulting JS bundle never finishes compiling, so the browser shows the dev-mode error overlay. Verify by visiting https://next-frontend-live.preview.emergentagent.com/dashboard or /admin/login post-login and seeing 'Uncaught runtime errors: Module build failed (from ./node_modules/babel-loader/lib/index.js): TypeError: ... QuickQuoteModal.js: Cannot read properties of null (reading traverse)'.
